Net finance result, not revenue.

candidates.why: OCI/translation item, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Gain from hedging purchases and sales
candidates.why: Not COGS.
Direct input cost and a clear COGS component.
Balance sheet inventory component, not period expense/COGS.

final_choice.row_label: Change in inventories of finished goods and in work in progress

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. Materials and Supplies is the clearest direct cost row from the candidate list. External Services may also contain direct project/service costs, but for COGS mapping the candidate list provides only one clear income-statement expense row.

candidates.why: Could be operating cost, but in this statement it is more likely direct service/project cost than SG&A overhead.
Core overhead component and strong SG&A candidate.
Explicit SG&A stock-based compensation component.
Broad overhead bucket and strong SG&A candidate.
Looks like an overhead component, but likely a subcomponent of broader operating/personnel expense buckets.
Balance row; should not be used.
R&D row exists but appears supplemental/below EBIT; not selected into SG&A under the placement rule.
Share-based compensation is an overhead-type cost, but likely supplemental and potentially overlapping with stock-based compensation in SGA/personnel.
Staff-related overhead label, but empty and less specific than Personnel expenses.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the best overhead buckets/components: Personnel expenses, Other operating expenses, and the explicit Stock-based Compensation in SGA row. Excluded External Services as likely direct operating/project cost, and excluded balancing/subcomponent rows to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D label, but appears below EBIT/supplemental and is empty in the preview.
Dedicated R&D total with populated values; appears below EBIT/supplemental but is the strongest available R&D row.

variables.notes: Only R&D-related rows appear below EBIT/supplemental, so they are not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS. Use the populated total first, with the more specific label as fallback.

Adjustment row, not a clean recurring interest line.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner-only equity line to exclude non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB.
